concept: Players manage a coffee and mochi shop, guiding customers through a multi-station workflow: taking orders at the Order Station, brewing coffee and steaming milk at the Brew Station, preparing mochi at the Mochi Station, and assembling drinks and mochi at the Build Station. Performance is rated on accuracy of coffee preparation (temperature, foam), mochi creation (shaping, toppings), and overall order assembly, directly affecting tips and daily scores.
name: Papa's Mocharia To Go!
